explanation: Carrier scan confirms delivery at 14:14 on the claimed date. Image analysis identified an authentic USPS delivery confirmation label with a matching timestamp. The claimant's written statement asserts non-delivery but directly contradicts the carrier record. Velocity check flagged 3 prior non-delivery claims from this account in the last 30 days.

actions.auditMessage: Claim auto-rejected: carrier confirms delivery and account velocity exceeds threshold.
Account flagged for enhanced review on all future claims.

signals.value: USPS scan: delivered 14:14 — matches claimed order date
signals.rationale: Shipping label image contains a valid USPS delivery barcode with a timestamp that directly contradicts the non-delivery claim.

signals.value: Claimant states 'never received' — carrier data shows delivered
signals.rationale: Text claim asserts non-delivery on a day carrier records show a completed scan at the delivery address.

signals.value: 3 non-delivery claims in 30 days from this account
signals.rationale: Account has filed 3 non-delivery claims in the past 30 days, well above the 0.5/month baseline.
Claim value is below the high-value threshold that would require manual review.

contradictions.description: Claimant's written statement conflicts with the carrier delivery scan extracted from the shipping label image.

auditTrail: Rule: high_velocity_reject — 3 claims in 30 days exceeds threshold of 2 → reject
Rule: carrier_delivery_confirmed — delivery scan present and timestamped → reject
